title: chrysopsis latisquamea
intro: Chrysopsis latisquamea, also known as Broad-leaved Goldeneye, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues like bronchitis and coughs. Chrysopsis latisquamea can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its extracts have been used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
